definition: Editorial national planning figure for a category; not a guaranteed service life.
Broad national working-life range intended for consumer planning.
Editorial confidence in the usefulness of the category range, not a statistical confidence interval.
Lifespan Lab editorial score out of 10; not a measured failure probability.
Position within the three brands highlighted for that appliance category.
Broad consumer planning range in US dollars; local quotes and parts can differ.
Restrained editorial multiplier used to model broad state conditions.
Whole-number percentage difference implied by the adjustment factor.
National typical years multiplied by the state adjustment factor and rounded to one decimal.
National range bounds multiplied by the state factor and rounded to one decimal.
Long-form editorial synthesis for one brand and appliance pairing.
What a source measures and the main limitation relevant to interpretation.
